name: Male Supremacy
description:
Very over-the-top and hardcore scenario. If you want to "live" through one of kingbang's comics play this. Men are absolute pigs here, both in attitude and hygiene.

Edit: I removed the gendered dialog examples, now you should be able to play as a male without any problems.

CW: Abuse, slavery, noncon, impact play, filth, smegma
creator: VeerTheQueer
